title: Lake Borgne Surge Barrier; memorial
doc_html:
§327.1. Lake Borgne Surge Barrier; memorial

            Notwithstanding the provisions of R.S. 42:267 or any other law to the contrary, the Lake Borgne Surge Barrier, otherwise known as the "Great Wall of Louisiana", shall be named the President George W. Bush Surge Barrier.

            Acts 2024, No. 441, §1.
doc_text:
§327.1.  Lake Borgne Surge Barrier; memorial
Notwithstanding the provisions of R.S. 42:267 or any other law to the
contrary, the Lake Borgne Surge Barrier, otherwise known as the "Great Wall of
Louisiana", shall be named the President George W. Bush Surge Barrier.
Acts 2024, No. 441, §1.
